workflow.name: Document Library Metadata Index Workflow
workflow.description: Generic FreshForge-shaped workflow for turning public technical-document corpora into source-anchored metadata indexes.

nodes.name: Register corpus documents
nodes.description: Create or update document-level corpus registry records with provenance, SHA256, document type, management unit, date, and extraction status.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Script may register sanitized document metadata only; raw documents and extracted text stay outside tracked Agent Workbench files.
agent_workbench.public_safety: raw documents and extracted text stay outside tracked Agent Workbench files

nodes.name: Extract text chunks
nodes.description: Extract document text into page or section chunks and write a tracked sanitized chunk manifest.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Target-project tooling extracts text and writes ignored raw chunks plus a sanitized manifest.
agent_workbench.raw_text_policy: ignored or data-managed outside Agent Workbench

nodes.name: Declare budget and stop rules
nodes.description: Validate the P59 budget declaration before any live worker call that may support economics claims.

outputs.stop_rule: maximum attempts, maximum paid cost, and maintainer checkpoint trigger

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Live worker execution for economics evidence fails closed without a valid budget declaration.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: supervisor checkpoint spans required for economics claims

nodes.name: Structure pass
nodes.description: Local worker extracts headings, components, tables, figures, maps, appendices, definitions, acronyms, and cross-references from bounded chunks.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Local worker may produce structure candidates only; no tracked mutation or acceptance.
agent_workbench.record_cap_policy: hidden caps forbidden; explicit ticket caps must state value, reason, and coverage-distortion risk
agent_workbench.token_accounting: worker input/output tokens plus supervisor orchestration span

nodes.name: Content metadata pass
nodes.description: Local worker extracts claims, assumptions, constraints, policy references, model inputs, numeric values, scenarios, and sensitivity tests.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Local worker may produce content metadata candidates only; no tracked mutation or acceptance.
agent_workbench.record_cap_policy: hidden caps forbidden; explicit ticket caps must state value, reason, and coverage-distortion risk
agent_workbench.token_accounting: worker input/output tokens plus supervisor orchestration span

nodes.name: Local self-audit
nodes.description: Local worker reviews candidate records plus source excerpts and labels likely defects before any paid supervisor audit.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Local self-audit is defect reduction only and does not validate or approve records.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: local worker input/output tokens at zero cash cost

provenance.implementation: configured Ollama worker model in audit mode

nodes.name: Delegated repair iteration
nodes.description: Local worker repairs candidate records using only self-audit labels and source excerpts.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Local repair produces revised candidates only and cannot approve or promote records.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: local worker input/output tokens at zero cash cost

provenance.implementation: configured Ollama worker model in repair mode

nodes.name: Convergence check
nodes.description: Deterministic policy checks format validity, repair yield, stop rules, and escalation conditions.

outputs.loop_decision: continue, stop_converged, stop_no_improvement, stop_budget, escalate_to_supervisor, or abandon

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Script may route the loop but cannot make semantic acceptance claims.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: none unless supervisor interprets the decision

nodes.name: Supervisor audit calibration
nodes.description: Paid supervisor audits a stratified sample against source excerpts, measures token cost, and estimates accepted/repairable/rejected rates.

outputs.audit_calibration: tracked sanitized audit and economics summary

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Paid supervisor owns source-level audit, economics interpretation, and scale or stop decision.
agent_workbench.decision_boundary: supervisor owns final labels and scale/stop decision
agent_workbench.soft_scoring: quote length and wording preferences are soft penalties unless downstream consumer contract makes them hard constraints

nodes.name: Assemble promoted index
nodes.description: Promote accepted and repaired records into the target project's searchable document metadata index.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Script may assemble only supervisor-accepted or explicitly repaired records into promoted outputs.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: tracked update span if paid supervisor edits or approves
agent_workbench.promotion_boundary: only accepted/repaired records with source anchors enter the index
agent_workbench.required_outcome_state: quality_validated_candidate true; promotion approved by supervisor or project policy
